description: Back on Zephyr One, the team prepares to release Sharpe, erasing his memories and maintaining cover to preserve the timeline. Deke and Mack fake a classic alien abduction threat, intimidating Sharpe into silence about what he observed. Sharpe, terrified, is left babbling about communists and flying saucers as a bystander finds him, wrapping up the mission and leaving local authorities baffled by his wild tale.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Earthling. You will not reveal what you've seen here today, or the next time we abduct you... ... you will be... probed.
Someone help me! I was just abducted by aliens!
Looks like we got a live one.
You have to believe me! I saw their spaceship! And... And I'm pretty sure they were Communists... from the future.
